meta.title: Douglas Feith on Oil Prices and Turmoil in Libya for Fox Business
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Douglas Feith joined Fox Business on March 25 to discuss the turmoil in Libya and what it may mean for oil prices worldwide.
